item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa kepentingan umum harus mempertimbangkan hak individu, tetapi dalam praktik hukum AS, kebebasan pribadi seringkali dianggap sebagai batas untuk kebijakan publik.

notes: Both agents write in Indonesian. Agent A begins and ends mildly pro-society-priority while repeatedly adding rights safeguards, so its movement is small. Agent B begins from a US rights-first concern about public-interest policy sacrificing individual freedom, then moves closer to a balanced position by accepting that public interest should consider individual rights, while still treating personal freedom as a boundary on public policy. Agent A's opener contains a typo or malformed word, "AKU SEKATU," but the rest of the turn makes its supportive position observable.
